creator: ijliao@Terry.Dorm10.NCTU.edu.tw
text:
lost `` in doc/FAQ/serial.sgml

in doc/FAQ/serial.sgml line 205

      you have to login as a regular user, then <htmlurl
      url="http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?su" name="su">'' to

must be

      you have to login as a regular user, then ``<htmlurl
      url="http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?su" name="su">'' to

Fix: 

add `` before <htmlurl
How-To-Repeat: 
more doc/FAQ/serial.sgml
